introSection: Alucinakis is a steel kiddie hybrid roller coaster located at Terra Mítica in Benidorm, Alicante, Valencian Community, Spain. The ride opened in July 2000, along with the park.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Deep reddish orange track and unpainted supports.

fullText:
Alucinakis is a steel kiddie hybrid roller coaster located at Terra Mítica in Benidorm, Alicante, Valencian Community, Spain. The ride opened in July 2000, along with the park.



Deep reddish orange track and unpainted supports.
